name: American Christmas
short_description: American Christmas is a Mario-Megaman-Sonic inspired 2D platformer. This game aims to recapture that magic feeling you’d get when gaming during a time in the 90's when 2D platformers reigned king in the gaming industry.
detailed_description: American Christmas is the story of a 12-year-old girl named "Kate" who is sent on a mission by an elf named "Tip", to go save a kidnapped Santa Clause. The gameplay consists of the Main Campaign which has an overworld map, 13 levels, a Petshop, and an Arcade; And Nightmare mode, which is a never-ending survival mode specifically made for hardcore gamers who want to put their 2D platforming skills to the ultimate test.
